briefs.title: BC Problem Gambling Regulation takes effect April 2026 — new rules for online gaming and casinos
briefs.summary: BC's new Problem Gambling Regulation requires the lottery corporation and casino operators to add spending limits, time limits, age checks, and self-exclusion tools to online gaming accounts and casino floors starting April 13, 2026.
briefs.action_required: Review your gaming operations and update systems to comply with the new Problem Gambling Regulation by April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Problem Gambling Regulation takes effect — Gaming Control Act
